description_long: This object is a pentagon-shaped serving tray with a low, continuous rim around its perimeter. The tray is constructed from a solid, dark gray material that appears to be either plastic or metal, giving it a modern and utilitarian look. The interior surface is flat and smooth, designed to hold or carry items securely. The rim is of uniform height and thickness, providing a subtle barrier to prevent objects from sliding off. There are no visible handles, decorative patterns, or branding on any surface, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall finish is matte, with no significant gloss or reflective highlights.
description: A pentagon-shaped, dark gray serving tray with a low, uniform rim and a smooth, matte finish. Minimalist design with no handles or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pentagonal shape and the low, continuous rim with the open side facing forward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the tray's depth and the consistent height of the rim along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the tray and the straight back edge of the pentagon.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the tray's depth and rim from the other side.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is low, continuous, and of uniform height and thickness, forming a raised edge around the pentagonal tray. It is flat-topped with no lips, grooves, or decorative features.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with very low reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. All parts of the object have a consistent, non-glossy finish.
